flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Iowa Area Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $9.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Iowa Area Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $6.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Iowa Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).
